commit.subject: LU-13344 test: test sec features with #37942
commit.message:
LU-13344 test: test sec features with #37942

Test sec features with #37942.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly
Test-Parameters: clientselinux mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 testlist=sanity,recovery-small,sanity-selinux
Test-Parameters: env=SHARED_KEY=true mdscount=2 mdtcount=4 testlist=sanity,recovery-small,sanity-sec
